mapper.sql: instance_id as instanceId, instance_code as instanceCode, instance_name as instanceName, instance_label as instanceLabel, instance_status as instanceStatus, status_name as statusName, template_id as templateId, template_code as templateCode, template_name as templateName, template_version as templateVersion, aircraft_id as aircraftId, model_id as modelId, model_code as modelCode, model_name as modelName, tail_number as tailNumber, msn, aircraft_type as aircraftType, operational_status as operationalStatus, current_version_id as currentVersionId, current_version_no as currentVersionNo, current_version_label as currentVersionLabel, version_level as versionLevel, generation_job_id as generationJobId, generation_job_code as generationJobCode, generation_job_status as generationJobStatus, generate_time as generateTime, page_count as pageCount, file_count as fileCount, data_record_count as dataRecordCount, document_entry_count as documentEntryCount, content_item_count as contentItemCount, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt, published_at as publishedAt, archived_at as archivedAt
mapper.select: select count(1)

select
from t1_v_dossier_instance_manage where instance_id = #{instanceId} and deleted_at is null

select dv.id as versionId, dv.dossier_instance_id as instanceId, dv.template_id as templateId, dv.template_code as templateCode, dv.template_version as templateVersion, dv.version_no as versionNo, dv.version_label as versionLabel, dv.version_level as versionLevel, dv.version_reason as versionReason, dv.is_current as isCurrent, dv.previous_version_id as previousVersionId, dv.generation_job_id as generationJobId, gj.job_code as generationJobCode, gj.job_status as generationJobStatus, cast(dv.content_summary_json as char) as contentSummaryJson, cast(dv.generation_params_json as char) as generationParamsJson, cast(gj.result_summary_json as char) as resultSummaryJson, cast(gj.output_json as char) as outputJson, dv.change_summary as changeSummary, dv.created_by as createdBy, dv.created_at as createdAt, dv.published_at as publishedAt from t1_dossier_version dv left join t1_generation_job gj on gj.id = dv.generation_job_id where dv.dossier_instance_id = #{instanceId} order by dv.version_no desc

select di.id as instanceId, di.aircraft_id as aircraftId, di.current_version_id as currentVersionId, count(distinct sn.id) as structureNodeCount, count(distinct dci.id) as contentItemCount, count(distinct fr.id) as documentCount, coalesce(sum(case when dci.completeness_status = 'missing' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as missingCount, coalesce(sum(case when dci.completeness_status = 'warning' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as warningCount, coalesce(sum(case when dci.is_key_part = 1 then 1 else 0 end), 0) as keyPartCount, max(dv.created_at) as latestVersionTime from t1_dossier_instance di left join t1_dossier_version dv on dv.id = di.current_version_id left join t1_dossier_structure_node sn on sn.dossier_version_id = dv.id left join t1_dossier_content_item dci on dci.dossier_version_id = dv.id left join t1_file_relation fr on fr.dossier_version_id = dv.id and fr.relation_status != 'deleted' where di.id = #{instanceId} and di.deleted_at is null group by di.id, di.aircraft_id, di.current_version_id
mapper.sql: abn.id as nodeId, abn.parent_id as parentId, abn.aircraft_id as aircraftId, abn.node_level as nodeLevel, abn.node_type as nodeType, abn.part_number as partNumber, abn.part_name as partName, abn.serial_number as serialNumber, abn.position_code as positionCode, abn.ata_chapter as ataChapter, abn.manufacturer, abn.install_date as installDate, abn.tsn_fh as tsnFh, abn.tsn_fc as tsnFc, abn.part_instance_id as partInstanceId, (select count(1) from t1_aircraft_bom_node c where c.parent_id = abn.id and c.is_active = 1) as childCount
mapper.select:
select
from t1_aircraft_bom_node abn where abn.id = #{nodeId} and abn.is_active = 1

select
from t1_aircraft_bom_node abn where abn.aircraft_id = #{aircraftId} and abn.is_active = 1
and abn.parent_id = #{parentId}
and abn.parent_id is null
order by abn.node_level, abn.position_code, abn.part_number limit 200

select
from t1_aircraft_bom_node abn where abn.aircraft_id = #{aircraftId} and abn.is_active = 1 and ( abn.part_number like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or abn.part_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or abn.serial_number like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or abn.position_code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or abn.ata_chapter like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) order by case when abn.part_number = #{keyword} then 0 else 1 end, abn.node_level, abn.part_number limit 60

with recursive bom_path as ( select abn.id as nodeId, abn.parent_id as parentId, abn.aircraft_id as aircraftId, abn.node_level as nodeLevel, abn.node_type as nodeType, abn.part_number as partNumber, abn.part_name as partName, abn.serial_number as serialNumber, abn.position_code as positionCode, abn.ata_chapter as ataChapter, abn.manufacturer, abn.install_date as installDate, abn.tsn_fh as tsnFh, abn.tsn_fc as tsnFc, abn.part_instance_id as partInstanceId, (select count(1) from t1_aircraft_bom_node c where c.parent_id = abn.id and c.is_active = 1) as childCount, 0 as depth from t1_aircraft_bom_node abn where abn.id = #{nodeId} and abn.is_active = 1 union all select p.id as nodeId, p.parent_id as parentId, p.aircraft_id as aircraftId, p.node_level as nodeLevel, p.node_type as nodeType, p.part_number as partNumber, p.part_name as partName, p.serial_number as serialNumber, p.position_code as positionCode, p.ata_chapter as ataChapter, p.manufacturer, p.install_date as installDate, p.tsn_fh as tsnFh, p.tsn_fc as tsnFc, p.part_instance_id as partInstanceId, (select count(1) from t1_aircraft_bom_node c where c.parent_id = p.id and c.is_active = 1) as childCount, bp.depth + 1 as depth from t1_aircraft_bom_node p inner join bom_path bp on bp.parentId = p.id where p.is_active = 1 ) select * from bom_path order by depth desc

select 'parent' as relationType, p.id as nodeId, p.parent_id as parentId, p.aircraft_id as aircraftId, p.node_level as nodeLevel, p.node_type as nodeType, p.part_number as partNumber, p.part_name as partName, p.serial_number as serialNumber, p.position_code as positionCode, p.ata_chapter as ataChapter, p.manufacturer, p.install_date as installDate, p.tsn_fh as tsnFh, p.tsn_fc as tsnFc, p.part_instance_id as partInstanceId, (select count(1) from t1_aircraft_bom_node pc where pc.parent_id = p.id and pc.is_active = 1) as childCount from t1_aircraft_bom_node n inner join t1_aircraft_bom_node p on p.id = n.parent_id where n.id = #{nodeId} and p.is_active = 1 union all select 'child' as relationType, c.id as nodeId, c.parent_id as parentId, c.aircraft_id as aircraftId, c.node_level as nodeLevel, c.node_type as nodeType, c.part_number as partNumber, c.part_name as partName, c.serial_number as serialNumber, c.position_code as positionCode, c.ata_chapter as ataChapter, c.manufacturer, c.install_date as installDate, c.tsn_fh as tsnFh, c.tsn_fc as tsnFc, c.part_instance_id as partInstanceId, (select count(1) from t1_aircraft_bom_node cc where cc.parent_id = c.id and cc.is_active = 1) as childCount from t1_aircraft_bom_node c where c.parent_id = #{nodeId} and c.is_active = 1 order by relationType desc, nodeLevel, positionCode, partNumber

select dci.id as characteristicId, dci.item_code as characteristicCode, dci.item_name as characteristicName, dci.lifecycle_stage as lifecycleStage, dci.source_system as sourceSystem, dci.source_table as sourceTable, dci.completeness_status as completenessStatus, dci.content_summary as contentSummary, cast(dci.attrs_json as char) as attrsJson from t1_aircraft_bom_node abn inner join t1_dossier_instance di on di.aircraft_id = abn.aircraft_id and di.deleted_at is null inner join t1_dossier_version dv on dv.id = di.current_version_id inner join t1_dossier_content_item dci on dci.dossier_version_id = dv.id and dci.bom_node_id = abn.id where abn.id = #{nodeId} and dci.item_status = 'active' and ( dci.is_key_part = 1 or dci.include_design_data = 1 or dci.include_manufacturing_data = 1 or dci.include_service_data = 1 ) order by dci.is_key_part desc, dci.sort_order, dci.item_code

select dci.id as contentItemId, dci.dossier_instance_id as instanceId, dci.dossier_version_id as versionId, dci.structure_node_id as structureNodeId, dci.item_code as itemCode, dci.item_name as itemName, dci.item_type as itemType, dci.lifecycle_stage as lifecycleStage, dci.aircraft_id as aircraftId, dci.bom_node_id as bomNodeId, dci.part_instance_id as partInstanceId, dci.is_key_part as isKeyPart, dci.supply_mode as supplyMode, dci.source_system as sourceSystem, dci.source_table as sourceTable, dci.source_record_key as sourceRecordKey, dci.completeness_status as completenessStatus, dci.content_summary as contentSummary, dci.file_storage_key as fileStorageKey, cast(dci.source_trace_json as char) as sourceTraceJson, cast(dci.attrs_json as char) as attrsJson, dci.created_at as createdAt, dci.updated_at as updatedAt from t1_aircraft_bom_node abn inner join t1_dossier_instance di on di.aircraft_id = abn.aircraft_id and di.deleted_at is null inner join t1_dossier_version dv on dv.id = di.current_version_id inner join t1_dossier_content_item dci on dci.dossier_version_id = dv.id and dci.bom_node_id = abn.id where abn.id = #{nodeId} and dci.item_status = 'active'
and (dci.include_design_data = 1 or dci.lifecycle_stage = 'DESIGN')
and (dci.include_manufacturing_data = 1 or dci.lifecycle_stage = 'MANUFACTURING')
and dci.item_type in ('INSPECTION', 'TEST', 'QUALITY_CHECK')
and dci.item_type in ('INSTALLATION', 'ASSEMBLY')
and (dci.include_service_data = 1 or dci.lifecycle_stage = 'SERVICE')
and dci.item_type in ('FAULT', 'FAILURE')
order by dci.sort_order, dci.item_code

select fr.id as documentEntryId, fr.dossier_instance_id as instanceId, fr.dossier_version_id as versionId, fr.structure_node_id as structureNodeId, coalesce(fa.business_no, fr.target_code, fr.source_record_key) as docNo, coalesce(fa.business_title, fa.display_name) as title, coalesce(fa.storage_key, fa.storage_path, fa.access_url) as fileStorageKey, coalesce(fr.source_system, fa.source_system) as sourceSystem, coalesce(fr.source_table, fa.source_table) as sourceTable, coalesce(fr.source_record_key, fa.source_record_key) as sourceRecordKey, fr.relation_status as documentStatus, fr.completeness_status as completenessStatus, fr.required_flag as requiredFlag, fr.included_flag as includedFlag, cast(fr.source_trace_json as char) as sourceTraceJson, cast(fr.business_meta_json as char) as attrsJson from t1_aircraft_bom_node abn inner join t1_dossier_instance di on di.aircraft_id = abn.aircraft_id and di.deleted_at is null inner join t1_dossier_version dv on dv.id = di.current_version_id inner join t1_dossier_structure_node sn on sn.dossier_version_id = dv.id and sn.bom_node_id = abn.id inner join t1_file_relation fr on fr.dossier_version_id = dv.id and fr.structure_node_id = sn.id inner join t1_file_asset fa on fa.id = fr.file_id where abn.id = #{nodeId} and fr.included_flag = 1 and fr.relation_status != 'deleted' order by fr.required_flag desc, title

select di.id as instanceId, di.current_version_id as versionId, di.aircraft_id as aircraftId, abn.id as bomNodeId from t1_aircraft_bom_node abn inner join t1_dossier_instance di on di.aircraft_id = abn.aircraft_id and di.deleted_at is null where abn.id = #{nodeId} order by case when di.status in ('ready','published') then 0 else 1 end, di.updated_at desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into t1_analysis_task (id, task_code, task_name, analysis_type, scope_type, scope_json, task_status, algorithm_code, algorithm_version, params_json, started_at, finished_at, created_by) values (#{taskId}, #{taskCode}, #{taskName}, 'cross_domain', #{scopeType}, #{scopeJson}, 'succeeded', #{algorithmCode}, #{algorithmVersion}, #{paramsJson}, sysdate(6), sysdate(6), #{createdBy})

insert into t1_analysis_result (id, task_id, result_type, result_title, result_summary, result_value_json, confidence, rank_no, related_object_type, related_object_id, evidence_json) values (#{resultId}, #{taskId}, #{resultType}, #{resultTitle}, #{resultSummary}, #{resultValueJson}, #{confidence}, #{rankNo}, #{relatedObjectType}, #{relatedObjectId}, #{evidenceJson})

insert into t1_dossier_operation_log (id, dossier_instance_id, dossier_version_id, operation_type, operation_name, operation_status, business_subject_type, business_subject_id, operator_id, operator_name, detail_json, result_message, operated_at) values (#{operationLogId}, #{instanceId}, #{versionId}, 'writeback', #{operationName}, 'succeeded', #{businessSubjectType}, #{businessSubjectId}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorName}, #{detailJson}, #{resultMessage}, sysdate(6))
mapper.select: select count(1)

select dol.id as changeId, dol.dossier_instance_id as instanceId, dol.dossier_version_id as versionId, dol.operation_type as changeType, dol.operation_name as changeName, dol.operation_status as changeStatus, dol.business_subject_type as subjectType, dol.business_subject_id as subjectId, dol.operator_name as operatorName, dol.result_message as resultMessage, dol.operated_at as changedAt, cast(dol.detail_json as char) as detailJson
order by dol.operated_at desc limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}

select dol.id as changeId, dol.dossier_instance_id as instanceId, dol.dossier_version_id as versionId, dol.operation_type as changeType, dol.operation_name as changeName, dol.operation_status as changeStatus, dol.business_subject_type as subjectType, dol.business_subject_id as subjectId, dol.operator_id as operatorId, dol.operator_name as operatorName, dol.result_message as resultMessage, dol.operated_at as changedAt, cast(dol.detail_json as char) as detailJson from t1_dossier_operation_log dol where dol.id = #{changeId}
select count(1)

select dol.id as logId, dol.dossier_instance_id as instanceId, dol.dossier_version_id as versionId, dol.operation_type as operationType, dol.operation_name as operationName, dol.operation_status as operationStatus, dol.business_subject_type as subjectType, dol.business_subject_id as subjectId, dol.operator_id as operatorId, dol.operator_name as operatorName, dol.source_ip as sourceIp, dol.result_message as resultMessage, dol.operated_at as changedAt, cast(dol.detail_json as char) as detailJson
order by dol.operated_at desc limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}

select dol.id as logId, dol.dossier_instance_id as instanceId, dol.dossier_version_id as versionId, dol.operation_type as operationType, dol.operation_name as operationName, dol.operation_status as operationStatus, dol.business_subject_type as subjectType, dol.business_subject_id as subjectId, dol.operator_id as operatorId, dol.operator_name as operatorName, dol.source_ip as sourceIp, dol.result_message as resultMessage, dol.operated_at as changedAt, cast(dol.detail_json as char) as detailJson from t1_dossier_operation_log dol where dol.id = #{logId}
mapper.insert: insert into t1_push_rule (id, rule_code, rule_name, trigger_type, target_domain, condition_json, receiver_type, receiver_ref, message_template, rule_status, created_by) values (#{subscriptionId}, #{subscriptionCode}, #{subscriptionName}, 'openapi_change', #{targetDomain}, #{conditionJson}, #{receiverType}, #{receiverRef}, #{messageTemplate}, 'active', #{createdBy})
mapper.update: update t1_push_rule set rule_status = 'disabled', updated_at = sysdate(6) where id = #{subscriptionId}
